title: Entanglement as a Quantum Resource
description: Master the resource theory of entanglement under LOCC operations - understanding entanglement measures, manipulation protocols, and the fundamental role of entanglement in quantum information processing.
learningObjectives: Define LOCC operations and explain why they form natural free operations for entanglement
Calculate and compare different entanglement measures: entropy, negativity, concurrence
Understand entanglement distillation and dilution protocols
Analyze the irreversibility of entanglement manipulation
Apply Nielsen's majorization theorem for pure state transformations
Connect entanglement resources to quantum communication tasks
